description:
Offered: Spring
This course includes an overview of the climate system, regional climate classification schemes, and examination of natural, long-term climate change. Recent and future climate change scenarios, including the role of human activity in altering Earth’s climate chemistry, are also discussed.
Prerequisite(s): GEOG 1000 or GEOG 2200 , or permission of the instructor
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, PL
prerequisites: GEOG 1000 or GEOG 2200 , or permission of the instructor
